accept_router_advertisements_on.description: Interface list on which to accept router advertisements (e.g. 'all').

min_neighbor_entries.description: Lower threshold for the IPv6 neighbor cache below which entries are not reclaimed.

soft_max_neighbor_entries.description: Soft ceiling for the IPv6 neighbor cache before aggressive garbage collection.

stale_neighbor_timeout.description: Time a stale IPv6 neighbor entry is kept before revalidation (e.g. '60').

multipath_hash_policy.description: Hashing fields for ECMP multipath route selection: l3, l4, or l3-inner.
